reviews.comment:
En esta estación de servicio , le compré un vaso de leche caliente y el impresentable empleado me la cobró 250 pesos y no me entregó ticket. Claramente me vio la cara y se guardó la Plata. Chorro.

(Translated by Google)
At this gas station, I bought a glass of hot milk, and the disreputable employee charged me 250 pesos and didn't give me a receipt. He clearly saw my face and pocketed the money. A thief.
